summary_en: Alfresa Holdings completed acquisition of 6.31 million shares (3.5% of outstanding) for ¥15.0 billion via ToSTNeT-3 to enhance capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition Results and Completion of Share Acquisition via Off-Exchange Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
On 18 May 2026, Alfresa Holdings Corporation announced completion of a share buyback programme conducted via the Tokyo Stock Exchange ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange trading system. The company acquired 6,307,800 ordinary shares, representing 3.5% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock), for a total consideration of approximately ¥15.0 billion. The acquisition was executed on 18 May 2026 and marks the completion of the buyback authorised and announced on 15 May 2026.

The company stated the acquisition was undertaken as part of agile capital allocation in response to changing business environments, with objectives of improving capital efficiency and enhancing shareholder returns. The disclosure notes that 2,208,100 shares purchased from Nomura Securities are subject to adjustment trading using company shares to align the effective acquisition price with the average share price over a specified period; consequently, final share count including such adjustments may vary.
